'''Omin-Oreh''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], originally from a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] at the bottom tip of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. He spoke rarely, and was soft-spoken when he did. Serving aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']], Omin-Oreh was a talented pilot, with promising deflection shooting, described by the others as "[[LTS|likely to survive]]."<ref name="XWOSG" />

Omin-Oreh was chosen by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] to serve as his [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]], along with [[Namrhe]], for a seemingly routine escort mission. The three [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] pilots would fly [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], defending the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Hunter (Lambda-class)|''Hunter'']] while it [[Battle of the Corellian system|captured]] an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transport]] carrying officers to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="XWOSG" /><ref name="XW" />

The Y-wings launched at 0455 hours and by 0547, Omin-Oreh was floating in a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] back on the ''Independence'' after being seriously wounded when his ship was shot down while protecting Farlander from Imperial [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]] launched from the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Immortal/Legends|Immortal]]'' as he attempted to prevent the transport's recapture.<ref name="XWOSG" />

Having recovered from his injuries, he returned to active duty shortly before the [[Battle of Kalla VII|capture]] of the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Priam (starship)|''Priam'']].<ref name="XWOSG" />
